title: Crumbly Spicy American Chorizo
description: A quick-fix, halal-friendly dish featuring salty and crumbly chorizo with added coriander for a spicy kick. Perfect for breakfast or snack time.
instructions: Finely chop the chorizo and set aside.
Grind the coriander finely, or use a mortar and pestle for a more rustic texture.
Mix the chopped chorizo with the ground coriander, chili flakes, olive oil, salt, and pepper in a bowl until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to an oven-safe dish. Ensure you have enough space as the mix will expand as it cooks.
Bake for 20-30 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
